text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Are those nails what I think they are?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup! ♪ I saw a picture in a magazine and knew I
had to buy this polish.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
"Enchant others with Allure Nails! ☆" That ad was
so cool... I want some too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Awww... But there's no way my allowance will
cover it...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you borrow mine? I'll bring the bottle
to school tomorrow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what it'll look like on me... Ehehe, I can't
wait to find out! ♪
